Uses: Cuts and all types of pain
Hindi Name: विषदूरी (Visadoori) / जंगली पुदीना (Jungli Pudina) / नई तुलसी  (Nayi Tulsi)

Uses: antidote against snake bite, to cow to increase flow of milk , root is good for menorrhagia, gonorrhea
blood purifier, worm troubles, asthmatics trouble, brain disorder and nervous affections
demulcents, diuretic, rheumatic pain, nervous disorder, dyspepsia, diarrhea and dysentery

English Name: Wax Gourd / Ash Gourd / Winter Melon

Uses: anti-scorbutic in drospy, anti-scorbutic in diarrhea

English Name: Balloon Vine / Love in a Puff

Uses: ringworm nd eczema, bronchitis and asthema, antidode for snake venom
blood coagulation in small injuries, pharyngitis
Blackens hair. Fresh leaves are used in elephantiasis, affection of liver and dropsy. A type of hair tonic is produced from it. Juice is also used for jaundice and fever.
Blackens hair. Fresh leaves are used in elephantiasis, affection of liver and dropsy. A type of hair tonic is produced from it. Juice is also used for jaundice and fever.
An aromatic herb used as a condiments in soups, meat etc.
Hindi Name: बन धनिया (Ban Dhaniya) / जंगली धनिया (Junglee Dhaniya)

Uses: The entire plant is considered as sedative, haemostatic, sop orphic, used medicinally in asthma, chronic bronchitis. The milky juice is useful in destroying warts.
Roots made into paste and rubbed on body in body pain.

Hindi Name: जल बड़ी बूटी (Jal Badi Booti)/ खुलखुरी (Khulkhuri)

Uses: Juice is useful in insect bite and scorpion sting.
Hindi Name: जापानी लता (Japani Lota )/ राबण लता ( Raban Lata)

English Name: Four O’Clock Flower / Marvel of Peru

Uses: Leaves made into paste applied to the fingers to relieve from fever. Seed are used as remedy for dysentery. Leaves used in skin disease.
Hindi Name: काला तुलसी (Kala Tulsi)/ वन तुलसी (Van Tulsi)

Uses: Plant juice is used as insect repellent. Seed used in headache. Leaves are used in for gonorrhea, rheumatism and paralysis.
Juice applied in burning sensation  of palms, juice is good for liver trouble, urinary disorder in children, jaundice, fever and bilious infection.
Juice is used in stomach problem, used in intoxication of wine, used in dysentery.
English Name: Creeping Wood Sorrel / Yellow Wood Sorrel

Uses: Plant is very good in stomach, kidney and liver problems. Decoction of leaves increase appetite.
Plant paste is used on head to reduce temperature.

used in jaundice, Young leaves are good for
 dysentery. Root juice is used in urino-genital troublesand gonorrhea.
Hindi Name: भुई आँवला (Bhui Amla)/ जंगली आँवलाई (Jangli Amlai)

Uses: Used against snakebite, convalescence of children, syphilis, gonorrhea

Hindi Name: बन पाते(Ban Paate)/ मास लेहरी(Maas Lehri )/ नीचा साग (Neecha Saag)
मीठी पत्ती (Mithi Patti)/ घोड़ा तुलसी (Ghoda Tulsi)

Uses: Roots juice is used against asthma and whooping cough

Decoction of rhizome is given in abdominal pain 
during menstruation cycle of women.
Red spots on tongue. Apply and rub on affected area
Genital herpes, burns, wounds, skin Infection.
hair growth and stomach trouble,  give to mother to increase flow of milk after birth
Leaf base is crushed and extract is given one time daily for amoebic dysentery and intestinal worms.

Leprosy, scabies, and syphillis in gonorrhea. Seed smoke in toothache and carriage. Oil pirgative and illuminating. Seed latex in dropsy, jaundice, cuta-neous affections, healing of ulcers, herpes, skin disease and snakebite
small boil, contraceptive and also in skin diseases
Improvement of memory and eye power.
Pain killer in insect bites and menstrual problem.

English Name: Ash Gourd / Wax Gourd / Winter Melon

Uses: wounds, bruises, boils, jaundice, snakebite, dysentery, urinary trouble and quick heakind of wounds
Sprain and pain, cough, asthma and cold, dysentery, cough, skin disease, cutaneous affection and elephantiasis and tooth ace

Hindi Name: धन मिर्च (Dhan Mirch)/ लोवोंगी मिर्ची (Lovongi Mirchi)

Uses: Pain relif, stiff neck, rheumatism, fever, piles, lumbago and nervous disorder
English Name: Balloon Vine / Love in a Puff

Uses: Hysteria, coetaneous disease, dyspepsia, nervous disorder, itches, ringworm and skin diseases
dysentery, liver trouble, nerve disorder, and stomach problem and induces appetite, taken with milk to improve memory, good for skin disease and a blood purifier, given to women after childbirth
Used as digestive, heals Dysentery, diarrhea.

Hindi Name: बाघ धोखा (Bagh Dokha)/ तीव्र गंधा (Tivra Gandha)
बाघ धोखा (Bagh Dokha)/ तीव्र गंधा (Tivra Gandha)

Uses: malarial fiver, tumors and skin disease
Kills intestinal worms, reduce blood pressure.
Juice of leaves mixed with salt applied around ears in earache and swelling of adjacent gland to relive pain. Juice antidote against snake poison.

Hindi Name: बंगाली कॉफी (Bengali Coffee)/ जंगली कॉफी (Junglee Coffee)

Uses: fever, bilious affection and snakebite, leprosy
Good digestion and get rid of intestinal worms.
Swelling of fingers of hands and legs.
Smoke of leaves is used seeds medicinally for asthma. A seed causes sleepiness. Poisonous and necrotic. Roots is good for tooth ace.
Fleshy calyx is used for stomach disorder. Jelly like pulp of fruit is applied to scalp for curing dandruff and falling hair.
Juice of the leaves is used to cut wounds for quick healing.
The entire plant is considered as sedative, haemostatic, sop orphic, used medicinally in asthma, chronic bronchitis. The milky juice is useful in destroying warts.

Hindi Name: सेहुंड (Sehund)/ थुहर (Thuhar)/ डंडा (Danda)/ डंडा थो़र (Danda Thor)

Uses: Latex is used for piles and diarrhoea.
Root juice is used against pneumonia.
The juice of the plant is used in ulcers, wounds and local inflammation. Leaves paste is used against insect bite and boils.
dysentery, liver trouble, nerve disorder, and stomach problem and induces appetite, taken with milk to improve memory, good for skin disease and a blood purifier, given to women after childbirth
Rheumatism, menstrual Problem and also used as Digestive.
Leaf and fruit paste is used on head as a remedy in high fever.
Leaves juice is used in jaundice, also used in urinary trouble and nervous hindrance.
Pounded leaves are used in piles.
Lack of appetite, sinusitis, Stomach complaints, headache, roots are used to treat ringworms, boils, swellings, Pneumonia and also in relief of snakebite.
Used against rabies, leaves juice with garlic are good in Stomach, Liver, spleen etc.

Scientific Name:
Litsea salicifolia (Roxb. Ex Nees) 
Hook. F.
Uses: Leaf paste is taken twice a day with lukewarm water to cure loose motion
Tender leaves are cooked With chicken to feed mother to increase the milk production for newborn baby.

Decoction made of leaves and bark is taken in 
empty stomach in treatment of dysentery
Leaf powder is used in wound portion to prevent mark in skin,  wood tar is used in for blackening teeth.
Leaf juice with milk is used as a good remedy for piles.
Disease of oral cavity (Pyorrhea, Bleeding gums, etc.)

Hindi Name: कड़ी पत्ता (Kadi Patta)/ मीठा नीम (Meetha Neem)
कड़ी पत्ता (Kadi Patta)/ मीठा नीम (Meetha Neem)
कड़ी पत्ता (Kadi Patta)/ मीठा नीम (Meetha Neem)

Uses: Dysentery and other Stomach problems. Roots are used to treat pneumonia.
Seed juice is used in Kidney trouble.

Hindi Name: राम तुलसी (Ram Tulsi)/ बन तुलसी (Ban Tulsi)
राम तुलसी (Ram Tulsi)/ बन तुलसी (Ban Tulsi)

Uses: Plant is diuretic, stomachic and used as liver tonic. It is also used in jaundice

Hindi Name: अमरूल साक (Amrul Sak)/ चुकुटरी पथिया (Chukutri Pathiya)/ टिनपथिया (Tinpathiya)

Uses: Indigestion, body-ache, also in post labour ailment and in bone fracture and pneumonia.
Roots are used in urinary trouble; juice with lime is used to suppress newly formed boils.
Roots are used in asthma and in chest pain. Leaves juice with black peeper used in rheumatic pain.

Consumption of young leaves is believed to be protective measure from the tapeworm and fat minimizes agent when cooked with pork. Also leaves are useful for diarrhea, dysentery and also used as digestive.

Hindi Name: मीठी पत्ती (Mithi Patti)/ घोड़ा तुलसी (Ghoda Tulsi)
मीठी पत्ती (Mithi Patti)/ घोड़ा तुलसी (Ghoda Tulsi)

Uses: Used in healing gangrenous ulcers and skin disease. Useful against worms.
Roots are used to cure toothache, Asthma and in cough.
Wound in the oral cavity, Dysentery
Roots are diuretic, good in rheumatic pain.

Hindi Name: छोटा धतूरा (Chota Dhatura)/ छोटा गोखलु (Chota Gokhalu)

Uses: Used against long standing malarial fever, urinary trouble
Hindi Name: छोटा धतूरा (Chota Dhatura)/ छोटा गोखलु (Chota Gokhalu)

Uses: Toothache or gum problem. It is stomachic
